svg.title: The Tinkerer’s Fibonacci Notes — Master Vector Layout
svg.desc: Single SVG master layout for two later renders: black-and-white line art and identical-geometry quill-on-parchment. Repository Fv convention is used. Finite ratios are marked as approximations; the normalized time panel is labeled as metaphor, not physical law.
svg.text: Precision note: Yesterday = 1/φ ≈ 0.618033988750; Today = 1; Tomorrow = φ ≈ 1.618033988750
FUTURE-SIDE INTERVAL IS φ TIMES THE PAST-SIDE INTERVAL
NOT AN EXACT LOGARITHMIC GOLDEN SPIRAL
EACH IDENTITY REQUIRES ITS STATED INDEXING
THE FUTURE TERM IS IMPLICIT IN THE SEEDS AND RULE
KNOWN FROM KNOWN, NOT CAUSED BY MAGIC
THE DUPLICATE ONE IS A HINGE
